2026-09.event_name: Championship 26-27 Finals | ONE PIECE CARD GAME - Official Web Site
2026-09.event_description: Play - Championship | For North America, Europe, and Latin America, there will be two Finals tournaments this year: Season 1 in August and September 2026, and Season 2 in January 2027. If a BANDAI CARD GAMES Fest happens to be taking place around the same time and place as a Finals event, the Finals will be hosted there.
2026-09.image_alt: Championship 26-27 Finals | ONE PIECE CARD GAME - Official Web Site
2026-09.notes: For North America, Europe, and Latin America, there will be two Finals tournaments this year: Season 1 in August and September 2026, and Season 2 in January 2027. If a BANDAI CARD GAMES Fest happens to be taking place around the same time and place as a Finals event, the Finals will be hosted there.

unknown.event_name: Ashes of the Empire Planetary Qualifier
unknown.event_description: Play - Planetary Qualifier | Discount registration of of $35 is available through Sunday, September 13. Registrations after that point will be full price. Players must register and pay here: https://www.atomicempire.com/Store/Event/11176 to be able to participate. Once registered and paid with the store, players will be added into the Melee event by the organizer, manually, on a weekly basis. Full event details, like the schedule and prizing, are also available at the registration link.
